5.reason: [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11 and causes compilation errors with modern compilers. Use 'fgets' instead.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11 and causes compilation errors with modern compilers. Use 'fgets' instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 1.0 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; using it may cause compilation errors or warnings in modern compilers.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 1.0 , reason:  [Using gets() is unsafe and deprecated; it may cause buffer overflow. Also, in some environments, gets() is not available, leading to compilation errors.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 1.0 , reason:  [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11 and causes compilation errors with modern compilers due to security risks. Use 'fgets' instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 1.0 , reason:  [Using 'gets' is unsafe and deprecated; it was removed in C11 and causes compilation errors with modern compilers due to security risks. Use 'fgets' instead.]
